key_items: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
SpaceX Officially Joins Public Bitcoin Leaderboard as 8th Largest Holder With 18,712 BTC
Standard Chartered Calls Crypto Bottom as Bitcoin Price Recovers From $59,000 Low
reasoning: Multiple positive macro catalysts are converging including the potential Iran peace deal reopening the Strait of Hormuz (which would redirect liquidity to risk-on assets), institutional adoption accelerating with major companies adding Bitcoin reserves (SpaceX, MicroStrategy, BNY Melon), and analyst consensus suggesting the crypto cycle low is in place. The security infrastructure improvements (quantum-proofing, institutional custody solutions) and regulatory clarity (CFTC no-action letters) remove medium-term uncertainty while Bitcoin consolidates near strong support levels.
risks: A breakdown of Trump's Iran peace deal negotiations or unexpected geopolitical escalation could quickly reverse risk-on sentiment and trigger stop-loss cascades below $64,000.
